title: Sign in to access the authenticated workspace
description: This verifies that a returning user can sign in and reach the authenticated workspace.

steps.description: Switch to the sign in view
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the authenticated workspace is displayed

title: Upload a supported resume and open the editor with parsed data
description: This verifies that a supported resume file can be uploaded and the editor opens with imported profile data.

steps.description: Choose to continue as a guest
Verify a loading indicator is displayed
Verify the profile editor is displayed with imported data

title: Update contact details and save the profile
description: This verifies that a loaded profile can be edited in the contact section and saved with a success notification.

steps.description: Choose to continue as a guest
Edit the name, email, phone, and location fields with valid values
Verify a success notification is visible

title: See a toast after importing a resume
description: This test verifies that importing a resume produces a brief notification indicating the import completed successfully.

steps.description: Verify an import success toast is displayed

title: Continue as a guest user
description: This verifies that a guest can proceed into the app without signing in.

steps.description: Choose to continue as a guest
Verify the upload or workspace area is displayed

title: Open a saved profile from the list
description: This verifies that a user can review saved profiles and load one into the editor.

steps.description: Choose to continue as a guest
Verify the selected profile is displayed in the editor

title: Edit and save the professional summary
description: This verifies that a loaded profile summary can be updated and saved with updated content reflected in the editor.

steps.description: Choose to continue as a guest
Verify a success notification is visible
Verify the updated summary character count is displayed

title: Add a new skill to the profile
description: This verifies that a user can add a professional skill with details and see it appear in the skills list.

steps.description: Load a profile in the editor
Fill in the years of experience field
Verify the new skill appears in the list

title: See a toast after saving changes
description: This test verifies that a save action triggers a success toast and the notification disappears automatically.

steps.description: Verify a success toast is displayed

title: Add a new experience entry
description: This verifies that a user can add work experience details and see the entry with its bullet points in the experience list.

steps.description: Load a profile in the editor
Fill in the dates field with valid employment dates
Verify the new experience entry appears in the list
Verify the bullet points are displayed for the experience entry

title: Create a new account successfully
description: This verifies that a guest can create an account and see a success confirmation.

steps.description: Switch to the create account view
Fill in the username field with a unique username
Fill in the email field with a valid email address
Fill in the password field with a valid password
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Request a password reset link
description: This verifies that a user can request password recovery and see a success confirmation.

steps.description: Switch to the forgot password view
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Remove an existing skill from the profile
description: This verifies that a user can remove a skill and no longer see it in the skills list.

steps.description: Load a profile in the editor
Verify the skill disappears from the list

title: Search jobs from profile skills
description: This test verifies that a loaded profile can produce ranked job matches based on the profile's skills and that results are shown to the user.

steps.description: Load a profile in the editor
Search for jobs using the profile skills
Verify a ranked list of job matches is displayed
Verify job source badges are displayed

title: Open the reset password flow from a token link
description: This verifies the complete password reset flow. The test navigates to the app, opens the Forgot Password view, submits a username to get a reset link, clicks the 'Click here to reset your password' link shown in the success message (which navigates to /?token=<real-jwt>), then submits a new password and sees a success confirmation. Do NOT hardcode a fake token — obtain the real JWT by completing the Forgot Password UI form first.

steps.description: Click 'Forgot Password?' to open the forgot password view
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Click 'Send Reset Link' to submit the forgot password form and receive the reset link
Verify a success message is visible containing a 'Click here to reset your password' link
Click the 'Click here to reset your password' anchor link in the success message to navigate to the reset password view
Fill in the new password field with a valid password
Click 'Reset Password' to submit the new password
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Generate a profile analysis after configuring AI
description: This verifies that a user can configure AI settings, run resume analysis from a loaded profile, and receive the analysis results successfully.

steps.description: Load a profile into the editor
Configure an AI provider in settings
Verify the analysis results are displayed
Verify keywords and improvement suggestions are displayed

title: See a toast after deleting an item
description: This test verifies that deleting a profile item shows a brief confirmation toast and it dismisses on its own.

steps.description: Create or select an item that can be deleted
Verify a deletion confirmation toast is displayed

title: Remove an existing experience entry
description: This verifies that a user can remove a work experience entry and no longer see it in the experience list.

steps.description: Load a profile in the editor
Verify the experience entry disappears from the list

title: Generate a cover letter for a job application
description: This verifies that a user can enter job details and generate a tailored cover letter from the current profile.

steps.description: Load a profile into the editor
Verify the generated cover letter is displayed
Verify the cover letter contains tailored content

title: Add a new link to contact information
description: This verifies that a loaded profile can store a new link in the contact section.

steps.description: Choose to continue as a guest
Add a new link with a label and a valid URL
Verify the new link is displayed in the list

title: Save AI provider settings
description: This test verifies that a user can choose an AI provider, enter its API key, save the settings, and receive confirmation.

steps.description: Verify a success notification is visible
Verify the selected provider settings are retained

title: See a toast after exporting profile data
description: This test verifies that exporting profile data shows a brief confirmation toast and the notification clears automatically.

steps.description: Verify an export success toast is displayed

title: Add a new project to the profile
description: This verifies that a user can add a portfolio project with supporting details and see it appear in the projects list.
category: Profile Editor — Projects, Education, and Certifications

steps.description: Load a profile in the editor
Fill in the project name field
Fill in the project description field
Fill in the project link field
Fill in the tech stack field
Verify the new project appears in the list

title: Generate a career roadmap with milestones
description: This verifies that a user can create a roadmap from the current profile and view the resulting timeline and milestones.

steps.description: Load a profile into the editor
Verify the roadmap timeline is displayed
Verify milestones, skills, projects, and resources are displayed

title: Export profile as JSON
description: This test verifies that a loaded profile can be exported as JSON from the export panel.

steps.description: Load a profile in the editor
Verify the JSON export action completes successfully
Verify the export file is made available

title: Filter job results by role location and portal
description: This test verifies that a loaded profile can be used to narrow job results by title, location, and portal and that the filtered results are shown.

steps.description: Load a profile in the editor
Verify filtered job results are displayed
Verify the results reflect the selected filters

title: See a toast after generating AI content
description: This test verifies that an AI action such as analysis, a cover letter, or a roadmap shows a brief notification and then dismisses.

steps.description: Run an AI action with the required configuration in place
Verify a completion toast is displayed

title: Delete a saved profile from the list
description: This verifies that a user can remove a saved profile after confirming the deletion.

steps.description: Choose to continue as a guest
Verify the profile is removed from the saved profiles list

title: Export profile as PDF
description: This test verifies that a loaded profile can be exported as PDF from the export panel.

steps.description: Load a profile in the editor
Verify the PDF export action completes successfully
Verify the export file is made available

title: Add a new education entry
description: This verifies that a user can add education history details and see the entry appear in the education list.
category: Profile Editor — Projects, Education, and Certifications

steps.description: Load a profile in the editor
Fill in the field of study field
Fill in the dates field with valid education dates
Verify the new education entry appears in the list

title: Save local AI configuration
description: This test verifies that a user can enable local AI, enter Ollama connection details, save the settings, and receive confirmation.

steps.description: Verify a success notification is visible
Verify the local AI settings are retained

title: Add a new certification to the profile
description: This verifies that a user can add a certification with issuer and date details and see it appear in the certifications list.
category: Profile Editor — Projects, Education, and Certifications

steps.description: Load a profile in the editor
Fill in the certification name field
Fill in the date field with a valid certification date

title: Show inline validation for invalid login or duplicate signup
description: This verifies that invalid credentials or a duplicate username produce an inline validation error.

steps.description: Switch to the sign in view
Fill in the username field with an invalid username
Fill in the password field with an invalid password
Verify an inline validation error is visible

title: Export profile as CSV
description: This test verifies that a loaded profile can be exported as CSV from the export panel.

steps.description: Load a profile in the editor
Verify the CSV export action completes successfully
Verify the export file is made available

title: Review recent activity history
description: This test verifies that a user can open the activity log and review recent actions with timestamps and details.

steps.description: Verify recent activity entries are displayed
Verify each entry shows a timestamp and action details

title: Remove an existing contact link
description: This verifies that an existing link can be removed from the contact section.

steps.description: Choose to continue as a guest
Verify the link is removed from the list

description: This verifies that a user can remove a project and no longer see it in the projects list.

Verify the project disappears from the list
